name: BrepLoopList
summary: Provides access to all the Loops in a Brep object.

methods.name: Add(BrepLoopType)
methods.summary: Create a new empty boundary loop. The new loop will not be part of a face and will not include any trim curves.

methods.name: Add(BrepLoopType, BrepFace)
methods.signature: public BrepLoop Add(BrepLoopType loopType, BrepFace face)
methods.summary: Create a new boundary loop on a face. After you get this BrepLoop, you still need to create the vertices, edges, and trims that define the loop.

returns.doc: New loop that needs to be filled in

methods.name: AddOuterLoop
methods.summary: Create a new outer boundary loop that runs along the sides of the face's surface. All the necessary trims, edges, and vertices are created and added to the brep.

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: index of face that needs an outer boundary that runs along the sides of its surface.

returns.doc: New outer boundary loop that is complete.

methods.name: AddPlanarFaceLoop
methods.signature: public BrepLoop AddPlanarFaceLoop(int faceIndex, BrepLoopType loopType, IEnumerable<Curve> boundaryCurves)
methods.summary: Add a planar trimming loop to a planar face

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: index of planar face. The underlying surface must be a PlaneSurface

params.name: loopType
params.doc: type of loop to add. If loopType is Unknown, then the loop direction is tested and the new loops type will be set to Outer or Inner. If the loopType is Outer, then the direction of the new loop is tested and flipped if it is clockwise. If the loopType is Inner, then the direction of the new loop is tested and flipped if it is counter-clockwise.

params.name: boundaryCurves
params.doc: list of 3d curves that form a simple (no self intersections) closed curve. These curves define the 3d edge geometry and should be near the planar surface.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that visits all edges.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of brep loops.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the BrepLoop at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
